title: Recruitment and selection
summary: 9609 AS recruitment and selection — internal vs external, methods, and fairness.

simpleExplanation.title: Attract then choose
simpleExplanation.summary: Recruitment generates applicants; selection identifies the best fit using interviews, tests, and references.
steps: Job description and person specification first.

sections.content: **Recruitment and selection** (2.1.3) follows **workforce planning**. Use **case study firms** in evaluation.
